defense_claim: Full target ODA benchmark is ready.
Seven planner/human methods were evaluated on 300 trials.
A* is collision-free in the current 2D geometric benchmark.
A* has no safety-distance violation in the current 2D benchmark.
RRT is collision-free in the current 2D geometric benchmark.
RRT has no safety-distance violation in the current 2D benchmark.
MPPI is collision-free in the current 2D geometric benchmark.
MPPI has a small residual safety-violation rate but the highest mean clearance.
Depth/radar/IMU can be tuned toward early risk recall.
Recall tuning trades accuracy for better future-risk detection.
Depth Anything V2 Small batch inference is practical for offline feature generation.
Model inference is faster than end-to-end video/cache processing.
LiDAR bbox/depth/fused perception outputs all produce planner-consumable maps.
Five perception sources x three planners pass collision-free path checks after inflation.
Three.js demo renders a nonblank scene on desktop.
Three.js demo renders a nonblank scene on mobile.
3D ESDF/MPPI synthetic indoor path is collision-free.
3D MPPI keeps positive ESDF clearance in the demo map.
TensorRT speedup is not claimed without a real engine build.
Full PX4/Gazebo closed-loop flight remains the next verifier.
